{{Infobox concept
| name = Highgold
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Highgold Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Highgold represents a significant stage of advancement within the [[Gold]] rank of [[sacred artists]]. Positioned between [[Lowgold]] and [[Truegold]], it is characterized by a higher density of [[madra]] and the presence of a [[Goldsign]]—a visual indicator used to identify an individual's specific [[Path]]. Achieving this level is a rare feat, with some estimates suggesting only one in a thousand Lowgolds successfully reaches Highgold. At this stage, practitioners often begin to inherit insights and skills from the [[Remnants]] they have bonded with. While some achieve this status by breaking down their [[Remnant]] for power, others follow different methods to expand their [[madra]] base. Highgold individuals are considered impressive and formidable combatants; they are often utilized as guards, servants, or team leaders in organized groups. Despite their strength, Highgold is merely one step in a much longer progression that leads toward [[Truegold]] and eventually [[Underlord]] status.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Highgold represents an impressive stage of advancement and a power stage that sits above the rank of [[Lowgold]]. As a status or group within the [[Five Factions Alliance]], this level of strength is achieved by only one in a thousand Lowgolds. Achieving a perfect [[Iron body]] guarantees reaching this rank, which is held by [[Jai Long]] as a title or status. However, this specific stage of advancement is temporary for [[Jai Long]], as he will no longer hold the Highgold rank within a year.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a rank of [[Gold]] above [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a level of strength or status.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a status or group within the [[Five Factions Alliance]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is an impressive stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a rank or status held by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a power stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A perfect [[Iron body]] guarantees [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a rank or title.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is a stage or rank that [[Jai Long]] will no longer be in a year.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Highgold]] is an advancement stage that only one in a thousand Lowgolds reaches.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Within the [[Jai clan]], Highgold represents a specific rank or stage. As an entity type, it exists as a level positioned above [[Lowgold]] that can be reached by cracking open a [[Remnant]]. While [[Yerin]] could theoretically achieve this state by letting go of her [[Remnant]], she finds herself stuck at the Highgold barrier. This boundary can be broken through the application of sufficient [[sword madra]]. Additionally, [[Lindon]] has successfully killed a Highgold.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jade]] is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Highgold]] is a type of opponent or entity.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a stage or destination.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a stage above [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] could reach [[Highgold]] if she let go of her [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a level or state that can be reached by cracking open a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a location that [[Yerin]] is stuck at the barrier of.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a boundary that can be broken with enough [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Highgold]] is a rank or stage within the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] killed a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Within the context of [[Remnant]] arms, Highgold serves as a specific rank or classification. The term also denotes a particular location and a level of advancement or stage. Furthermore, Highgold describes both a rank for applicants and a specific measure of [[madra]] potency. In certain instances, a Highgold [[sword]] artist may be found nearby.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Highgold]] is a rank or classification for [[Remnant]] arms.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Highgold]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Highgold]] is a rank for applicants.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There is a [[Highgold]] [[sword]] artist nearby.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Highgold]] is a rank of [[madra]] potency.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Highgold]] is a level of advancement/stage.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Highgold represents a specific stage of power and density, serving as an advancement level on the [[Path of Black Flame]]. Within its natural habitat, this designation identifies a particular class of fish that exerts pressure equivalent to the stage itself. This level of power is so significant that a single glass of [[Spirit Well]] could potentially push a Highgold to the brink of further advancement. Beyond its biological classification as a type of [[dragon]], a Highgold is an entity capable of operating launcher constructs.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]] is a stage or level of power/density.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The fish give off the same pressure as a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]] is a level of fish in the habitat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A glass of [[Spirit Well]] could take a [[Highgold]] to the brink of advancement.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]] is a stage of advancement on the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]] is a group or entity that can operate launcher constructs.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Highgold]] is a type of [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Highgold serves as a specific rank within the [[Skysworn]], a stage that [[Mercy]] once reached and which currently defines [[Yerin]]'s second core. Within the [[Blackflame Empire]] camp, thousands of individuals have achieved this rank before breaking through to [[Truegold]]. While Highgolds reside in small groups within tents, the rank is considered inferior to that of an [[Underlord]]. Those at this level can manifest purple crystalline armor and exert the pressure associated with a peak [[Truegold]], such as a young man seen wielding a [[Forged sword]] of pale light.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Highgold]] is a rank within the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s second core is still [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Hundreds or thousands of Highgolds have broken through to [[Truegold]] in the [[Blackflame Empire]] camp.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Highgold]] is a stage [[Mercy]] reached.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A young [[Highgold]] man stood next to her, holding a [[Forged sword]] of pale light in both hands.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Highgolds have tents containing only a few other people.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Advancing to [[Highgold]] is inferior to advancing to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Highgold]] has purple crystalline armor and the pressure of a peak [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Highgolds were among the spectators watching from further back.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Highgolds were fighting [[Bloody Thorn]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Highgolds are a type of character who attacked [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“Just a bit of trouble, nothing to concern you, Highgold.”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“When I was Iron, my master didn't press me to fight a Highgold in a year's time.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
